critical.mandate: Ground truth accuracy is foundational — every other Val workflow depends on it
Never silently delete entries — mark removed files with REMOVED status
Load ground-truth-management skill sections JIT — never pre-load
Behavior must be identical whether called standalone or as sub-step from another workflow

step.title: Initialize Validator Sidecar
step.action: Check if {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/ directory exists
Create {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/ directory
Create {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/ground-truth.md with empty header containing last-refresh timestamp set to "never"
Create {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/decision-log.md with header: "# Val Decision Log" and empty entries
Create {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/conversation-context.md with header: "# Val Conversation Context" and empty rolling state

step.title: Determine Refresh Mode
step.action: Check if --incremental flag was passed
Set mode to incremental — only scan files modified since last-refresh timestamp from ground-truth.md header
Set mode to full — scan all targets completely. Full refresh catches deletions and renames that incremental would miss.

step.title: Load Entry Structure
step.action: Load ground-truth-management skill section: entry-structure (JIT)
Use entry-structure format for all ground truth entries written in subsequent steps

step.title: Parse Previous State
step.action: Read existing {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/ground-truth.md
Extract last-refresh timestamp from header
Parse all existing entries into a lookup map keyed by file path for diff comparison
Filter scan targets to only files modified after last-refresh timestamp

step.title: Scan Inventory Targets
step.action: Load ground-truth-management skill section based on mode: full-refresh or incremental-refresh (JIT)
Scan the following 11 inventory targets, showing section-by-section progress to the user after each target completes:
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/lifecycle/agents/*.md Extract: agent ID, name, model, persona summary Report progress: "Scanning lifecycle agents... found N agents."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/lifecycle/workflows/*/workflow.yaml (recursive) Extract: workflow name, inputs, outputs, agent, phase Report progress: "Scanning lifecycle workflows... found N workflows."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/dev/agents/*.md Extract: agent ID, name, stack, extends reference Report progress: "Scanning dev agents... found N agents."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/dev/skills/*.md Extract: skill name, sections list Report progress: "Scanning dev skills... found N skills."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/lifecycle/skills/*.md Extract: skill name, sections list Report progress: "Scanning lifecycle skills... found N skills."
Scan {project-root}/.claude/commands/gaia-*.md Extract: command name, model, workflow path reference Report progress: "Scanning slash commands... found N commands."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/_config/workflow-manifest.csv Extract: all entries, cross-reference against discovered workflows Report progress: "Scanning workflow manifest... found N entries."
Scan {project-root}/_gaia/_config/global.yaml Extract: framework version, project settings, output paths Report progress: "Scanning global config... extracted framework settings."
Scan {project-root}/docs/planning-artifacts/*.md Extract: artifact name, type, date Report progress: "Scanning planning artifacts... found N artifacts."
Scan {project-root}/docs/implementation-artifacts/*.md Extract: artifact name, type, story key if applicable Report progress: "Scanning implementation artifacts... found N artifacts."
Scan {project-root}/docs/test-artifacts/*.md Extract: artifact name, type, coverage area Report progress: "Scanning test artifacts... found N artifacts."

step.title: Compare and Detect Changes
step.action: Compare scan results against previous state from Step 4
Classify each entry as: ADDED (new file not in previous state), UPDATED (file exists but metadata changed), UNCHANGED (no changes detected)
For entries in previous state not found in scan results: mark as REMOVED with detection date (e.g., "REMOVED (file deleted, detected 2026-03-19)"). Do NOT silently delete entries.
Skip deletion detection — incremental mode cannot detect deletions. This is a documented limitation.
Load ground-truth-management skill section: conflict-resolution (JIT) if any conflicts are detected between scan results and existing entries

step.title: Write Ground Truth
step.action: Update {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/ground-truth.md with all scan results
Write header with last-refresh timestamp set to current date/time
Organize entries by category: Agents, Workflows, Skills, Commands, Manifests, Config, Artifacts
Include verified counts, locations, and structural patterns for each category
Preserve REMOVED entries with their detection dates — do not purge

step.title: Generate Diff Report
step.action: Generate diff/delta report summarizing changes since last refresh
Include counts by category: added, removed, updated entries
Include total entry count across all categories
Format: "Added: N new workflows, N new agents. Removed: N deleted commands. Updated: N file paths changed. Total entries: N."
Present the full diff report to the user

step.title: Log to Decision Log
step.action: Append the diff/delta report to {project-root}/_memory/validator-sidecar/decision-log.md
Include date, refresh mode (full or incremental), and summary
Format: "## Refresh — {date} ({mode})\n{summary}"

step.title: Check Token Budget
step.action: Load ground-truth-management skill section: token-budget (JIT)
Estimate token count of ground-truth.md
If token count exceeds budget threshold: trigger archival of oldest REMOVED entries per token-budget skill guidance
Report token usage to user

step.title: Present Results
step.template-output: Ground truth refreshed with verified inventory of all framework components. Includes last-refresh timestamp, categorized entries, and REMOVED markers for deleted files.
